result.summary: Visual analysis of the page reveals minor clipping issues.

issues.description: The third game tile in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section is partially cut off on the right.
issues.suggestion: Adjust scrolling container or tile sizing.

issues.description: The third game tile in the 'Top Played New Games' section is partially cut off on the right.
issues.suggestion: Adjust scrolling container or tile sizing.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles in 'Top Played New Games' is cut off by the navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add padding to the bottom of the scrollable area.
